explanation: Baking Soda, Baking Powder, Yeast, and Whipped Egg Whites are all common agents or methods used to leaven (make rise) baked goods through chemical, biological, or mechanical processes. Gelatin is a gelling agent used for thickening and setting, not for leavening.

The first four individuals are widely credited with inventing technologies (powered flight, printing press, telephone, practical electric light/phonograph) that fundamentally transformed global communication, industry, or daily life. Isaac Newton was a foundational scientist, mathematician, and philosopher, but not an inventor of a widely adopted technological device in the same vein.
Four of the words (Dozen, Pair, Score, Gross) represent specific numerical quantities for counting discrete items. Decade represents a specific quantity of time.
